content: 📌 pi-lens active — automated checks run on your edits and writes. Blocking errors will be shown inline; you must fix all errors including pre-existing ones. Prefer: lsp_diagnostics for proactive file/folder/batch error checks, lsp_navigation for definitions/references/symbols, ast_grep_search for code patterns (retry once with a simpler valid AST pattern on zero matches), grep for text/TODO search.
